TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == tu sep tu nem mihcaan Amilika debungan ku Wi-nei-zuy-la 2026ŚĻīÁĺéŚúčŤ•≤śďäŚßĒŚÖßÁĎěśčČ == tuseptunem mihcaan cay bulad lu demiad tu kanihalan, Amilika misuayaw tu Wi-nei-zuy-la nu suo-tu Ka-la-ka-se kitidaan palekal tu " demen ku nabalucuan nu wayway" " egu han Operation Absolute Resolve" a hitay mikuwang atu lalaay nu nipidebungan, a alaen ku Wi-nei-zuy-la Cung-tung ci Ni-ku-la-se.Ma-tu-luo atu acawa nida ci Si-li-ya.Fuo-luo-lei-se, saan a palecaden kina cen-cin tu nikakakutay. ina kawaw namaka caysiwwalsiw mihcaan tu Amilika Cung-tung ci Ciaw-ce.He-puo-te'.Wuo-ke'.Pu-si musakamu tu hitay nu Amilika tu sapidakep i tawyaay nu Pa-na-ma sakakaay nu hitay ci Man-niw.Nuo-zuy-ciaw, patideng tu kapahay a Cung-tung ci Ci-lei-muo.n-ta-la pacakat, milawit tu lupic mihcaan ina Amilika kina cacay aca miawas tu duma nu kanatal midakep a nikalepacawan nu waywayan. 2026ŚĻī1śúą3śó•ŚáĆśô®, . saan ku sihu nu Alika ina sapidebung u mangalayay a midakep tu pacakayay tu dukuan, makayda i kanatal nu kincalan amidakep ci Ma-tu an, nika ina hitay caay pisaayaw a musakamu tu Amilika. ina Wi-nei-zuy-la maynah tu mahiniay a kawawan " pihaceng ku nipidebung nu hitay", mihantay tu " Lein-he-kuo hulican", saan mihapu tu hamin nu kanatalan tu kabalihenawan nu waywayan, Hu-cung-tung ci De-e-si. Luo-de-li-ke-se saan tu nikudan mala Wi-nei-zuy-la pilinzian nu Cung-tung. mapalekal kina kawaw itini i kanatal katuud ku miadihay atu caayay kalecad nu nisimsiman. saan ku Amilika nu Cung-tung ci Cun-pu, amilawa ku Amilik tu Wi-nei-zuy-la, katukuh tu cinli a mahedek, nika saan ci Luo-de-li-ke-se mibelih tina kamuan, nikudan ina Amilika nu Kuo-w'-yen ci Lu-pi-o patalumaen nida ku nakamuan nida. nikudan saan ci Luo-de-li-ke-se tu Wi-nei-zuy-la u nikasasakamuen sa a cacay caay kaw nikangalay a malepacaw sa, miawda tu Amilika mapulung palekal tu sakangaay nu sakalahat tu sakadadiput nu kawawaan sa. . pikalepacawan nu waywayan Ť•≤śďäŤ°ĆŚčē teban nu labi tu tusaay a tuki, kina pitu kiya ku nikabakuhacan nu Wi-nei-zuy-la, idaw ku makaadihay tu isasa nu hikukian a mubahel, nikabakuhacan angangan ha nitida i La-kua-yi-la, Yi-kua-luo-te', Ma-muo-kaw-yen, Pa-lu-ta, Ay-e-ha-ti-lei, Ca-la-la-wi atu Ka-men.D.U-li-ya tu niyaniyaduan, ina kitidaan itida namin i Wi-nei-zuy-la tapiingan nu maci. u bakuhacenanay u sakaytelayan atu kakitidaan nu hitay. ŚáĆśô®2ťĽěŚ∑¶ŚŹ≥, . saan ku Mei-len-se, nina nika lepacawan matulin tu pangkiw nu tukian. idaw ku makaadihay nu tademaw tina Ka-la-ka-se nu hitayan idaw ku wacah namakalabu sa, idaw ku kainai'an nu dingkian. ina Wi-nei-zuy-la mibelihay nu sakakaay ci Ma-li-ya. Ke-zuy-na.Ma-ca-duo nu musakamuay a tademaw ci Ta-wi.Se-muo-lan-se-ci musakamu tu Ke-lun-pi-ya pasingbungay, u Ti-u-na-paw atu Mi-lan-ta kung nu hitayan, La-kua-yi-la minatu atu Ay-e-wuo-kan buyu nu dingkian katukuhan tu a malucek a kuwangan. Wi-nei-zuy-la nu hitay a sakakaay ci Fuo-la-di-mi-e. Pa-de-li-nuo. Luo-pei-ce saan, ina Amilika nu sikulupilaan a hikuki itida i tukay a patahekal tu silamalay nu lacuan atu mubahelay nu lacuan, ayda misametek henay pina ku mapatayay a tademaw sa. .
S.PHON: == tu s…ôp tu n…ôm mińß ¶aan amir~…ĺika d…ôbuŇčan ku wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa ************* == tus…ôptun…ôm mińß ¶aan ¶aj bur~…ĺad r~…ĺu d…ômiad tu kanińßar~…ĺan, amir~…ĺika misuajaw tu wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa nu suo-tu ka-r~…ĺa-ka-s…ô kitidaan par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu " d…ôm…ôn ku nabar~…ĺu ¶uan nu wajwaj" " …ôgu ńßan op…ôration absor~…ĺut…ô *…ôsor~…ĺ*…ô" a ńßitaj mikuwaŇč atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj nu nipid…ôbuŇčan, a ar~…ĺa…ôn ku wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i ni-ku-r~…ĺa-s…ô.ma-tu-r~…ĺuo atu a ¶awa nida ¶i si-r~…ĺi-ja.fuo-r~…ĺuo-r~…ĺ…ôi-s…ô, saan a par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad…ôn kina ¶…ôn- ¶in tu nikakakutaj. ina kawaw namaka ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺsiw mińß ¶aan tu amir~…ĺika ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i ¶iaw- ¶…ô.ńß…ô-puo-t…ô Ē~ °.wuo-k…ô Ē~ °.pu-si musakamu tu ńßitaj nu amir~…ĺika tu sapidak…ôp i tawjaaj nu pa-na-ma sakakaaj nu ńßitaj ¶i man-niw.nuo-zuj- ¶iaw, patid…ôŇč tu kapańßaj a ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺ…ôi-muo.n-ta-r~…ĺa pa ¶akat, mir~…ĺawit tu r~…ĺupi ¶ mińß ¶aan ina amir~…ĺika kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a miawas tu duma nu kanatar~…ĺ midak…ôp a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu wajwajan. ***********, . saan ku sińßu nu ar~…ĺika ina sapid…ôbuŇč u maŇčar~…ĺajaj a midak…ôp tu pa ¶akajaj tu dukuan, makajda i kanatar~…ĺ nu kin ¶ar~…ĺan amidak…ôp ¶i ma-tu an, nika ina ńßitaj ¶aaj pisaajaw a musakamu tu amir~…ĺika. ina wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa majnańß tu mańßiniaj a kawawan " pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku nipid…ôbuŇč nu ńßitaj", mińßantaj tu " r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kuo ńßur~…ĺi ¶an", saan mińßapu tu ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺan tu kabar~…ĺińß…ônawan nu wajwajan, ńßu- ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i d…ô-…ô-si. r~…ĺuo-d…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s…ô saan tu nikudan mar~…ĺa wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa pir~…ĺinzian nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč. mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ kina kawaw itini i kanatar~…ĺ katuud ku miadińßaj atu ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu nisimsiman. saan ku amir~…ĺika nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i ¶un-pu, amir~…ĺawa ku amir~…ĺik tu wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa, katukuńß tu ¶inr~…ĺi a mańß…ôd…ôk, nika saan ¶i r~…ĺuo-d…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s…ô mib…ôr~…ĺińß tina kamuan, nikudan ina amir~…ĺika nu kuo-w Ē~ °-j…ôn ¶i r~…ĺu-pi-o patar~…ĺuma…ôn nida ku nakamuan nida. nikudan saan ¶i r~…ĺuo-d…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s…ô tu wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa u nikasasakamu…ôn sa a ¶a ¶aj ¶aaj kaw nikaŇčar~…ĺaj a mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw sa, miawda tu amir~…ĺika mapur~…ĺuŇč par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakaŇčaaj nu sakar~…ĺańßat tu sakadadiput nu kawawaan sa. . pikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu wajwajan **** t…ôban nu r~…ĺabi tu tusaaj a tuki, kina pitu kija ku nikabakuńßa ¶an nu wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa, idaw ku makaadińßaj tu isasa nu ńßikukian a mubańß…ôr~…ĺ, nikabakuńßa ¶an aŇčaŇčan ńßa nitida i r~…ĺa-kua-ji-r~…ĺa, ji-kua-r~…ĺuo-t…ô Ē~ °, ma-muo-kaw-j…ôn, pa-r~…ĺu-ta, aj-…ô-ńßa-ti-r~…ĺ…ôi, ¶a-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺa-wi atu ka-m…ôn.d.u-r~…ĺi-ja tu nijanijaduan, ina kitidaan itida namin i wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa tapiiŇčan nu ma ¶i. u bakuńßa ¶…ônanaj u sakajt…ôr~…ĺajan atu kakitidaan nu ńßitaj. ******, . saan ku m…ôi-r~…ĺ…ôn-s…ô, nina nika r~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan matur~…ĺin tu paŇčkiw nu tukian. idaw ku makaadińßaj nu tad…ômaw tina ka-r~…ĺa-ka-s…ô nu ńßitajan idaw ku wa ¶ańß namakar~…ĺabu sa, idaw ku kainai Ē~ °an nu diŇčkian. ina wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa mib…ôr~…ĺińßaj nu sakakaaj ¶i ma-r~…ĺi-ja. k…ô-zuj-na.ma- ¶a-duo nu musakamuaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ta-wi.s…ô-muo-r~…ĺan-s…ô- ¶i musakamu tu k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja pasiŇčbuŇčaj, u ti-u-na-paw atu mi-r~…ĺan-ta kuŇč nu ńßitajan, r~…ĺa-kua-ji-r~…ĺa minatu atu aj-…ô-wuo-kan buju nu diŇčkian katukuńßan tu a mar~…ĺu ¶…ôk a kuwaŇčan. wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa nu ńßitaj a sakakaaj ¶i fuo-r~…ĺa-di-mi-…ô. pa-d…ô-r~…ĺi-nuo. r~…ĺuo-p…ôi- ¶…ô saan, ina amir~…ĺika nu sikur~…ĺupir~…ĺaan a ńßikuki itida i tukaj a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺa ¶uan atu mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺa ¶uan, ajda misam…ôt…ôk ńß…ônaj pina ku mapatajaj a tad…ômaw sa. .
S.FORM: == tu sep tu nem mihcaan Amilika debungan ku Wi-nei-zuy-la 2026ŚĻīÁĺéŚúčŤ•≤śďäŚßĒŚÖßÁĎěśčČ == tuseptunem mihcaan cay bulad lu demiad tu kanihalan, Amilika misuayaw tu Wi-nei-zuy-la nu suo-tu Ka-la-ka-se kitidaan palekal tu " demen ku nabalucuan nu wayway" " egu han Operation Absolute Resolve" a hitay mikuwang atu lalaay nu nipidebungan, a alaen ku Wi-nei-zuy-la Cung-tung ci Ni-ku-la-se.Ma-tu-luo atu acawa nida ci Si-li-ya.Fuo-luo-lei-se, saan a palecaden kina cen-cin tu nikakakutay. ina kawaw namaka caysiwwalsiw mihcaan tu Amilika Cung-tung ci Ciaw-ce.He-puo-te'.Wuo-ke'.Pu-si musakamu tu hitay nu Amilika tu sapidakep i tawyaay nu Pa-na-ma sakakaay nu hitay ci Man-niw.Nuo-zuy-ciaw, patideng tu kapahay a Cung-tung ci Ci-lei-muo.n-ta-la pacakat, milawit tu lupic mihcaan ina Amilika kina cacay aca miawas tu duma nu kanatal midakep a nikalepacawan nu waywayan. 2026ŚĻī1śúą3śó•ŚáĆśô®, . saan ku sihu nu Alika ina sapidebung u mangalayay a midakep tu pacakayay tu dukuan, makayda i kanatal nu kincalan amidakep ci Ma-tu an, nika ina hitay caay pisaayaw a musakamu tu Amilika. ina Wi-nei-zuy-la maynah tu mahiniay a kawawan " pihaceng ku nipidebung nu hitay", mihantay tu " Lein-he-kuo hulican", saan mihapu tu hamin nu kanatalan tu kabalihenawan nu waywayan, Hu-cung-tung ci De-e-si. Luo-de-li-ke-se saan tu nikudan mala Wi-nei-zuy-la pilinzian nu Cung-tung. mapalekal kina kawaw itini i kanatal katuud ku miadihay atu caayay kalecad nu nisimsiman. saan ku Amilika nu Cung-tung ci Cun-pu, amilawa ku Amilik tu Wi-nei-zuy-la, katukuh tu cinli a mahedek, nika saan ci Luo-de-li-ke-se mibelih tina kamuan, nikudan ina Amilika nu Kuo-w'-yen ci Lu-pi-o patalumaen nida ku nakamuan nida. nikudan saan ci Luo-de-li-ke-se tu Wi-nei-zuy-la u nikasasakamuen sa a cacay caay kaw nikangalay a malepacaw sa, miawda tu Amilika mapulung palekal tu sakangaay nu sakalahat tu sakadadiput nu kawawaan sa. . pikalepacawan nu waywayan Ť•≤śďäŤ°ĆŚčē teban nu labi tu tusaay a tuki, kina pitu kiya ku nikabakuhacan nu Wi-nei-zuy-la, idaw ku makaadihay tu isasa nu hikukian a mubahel, nikabakuhacan angangan ha nitida i La-kua-yi-la, Yi-kua-luo-te', Ma-muo-kaw-yen, Pa-lu-ta, Ay-e-ha-ti-lei, Ca-la-la-wi atu Ka-men.D.U-li-ya tu niyaniyaduan, ina kitidaan itida namin i Wi-nei-zuy-la tapiingan nu maci. u bakuhacenanay u sakaytelayan atu kakitidaan nu hitay. ŚáĆśô®2ťĽěŚ∑¶ŚŹ≥, . saan ku Mei-len-se, nina nika lepacawan matulin tu pangkiw nu tukian. idaw ku makaadihay nu tademaw tina Ka-la-ka-se nu hitayan idaw ku wacah namakalabu sa, idaw ku kainai'an nu dingkian. ina Wi-nei-zuy-la mibelihay nu sakakaay ci Ma-li-ya. Ke-zuy-na.Ma-ca-duo nu musakamuay a tademaw ci Ta-wi.Se-muo-lan-se-ci musakamu tu Ke-lun-pi-ya pasingbungay, u Ti-u-na-paw atu Mi-lan-ta kung nu hitayan, La-kua-yi-la minatu atu Ay-e-wuo-kan buyu nu dingkian katukuhan tu a malucek a kuwangan. Wi-nei-zuy-la nu hitay a sakakaay ci Fuo-la-di-mi-e. Pa-de-li-nuo. Luo-pei-ce saan, ina Amilika nu sikulupilaan a hikuki itida i tukay a patahekal tu silamalay nu lacuan atu mubahelay nu lacuan, ayda misametek henay pina ku mapatayay a tademaw sa. .

wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa nu suo-tu ka-r~…ĺa-ka-s…ô kitidaan par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu " d…ôm…ôn ku nabar~…ĺu ¶uan nu wajwaj" " …ôgu ńßan op…ôration absor~…ĺut…ô *…ôsor~…ĺ*…ô" a ńßitaj mikuwaŇč atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj nu nipid…ôbuŇčan, a ar~…ĺa…ôn ku wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i ni-ku-r~…ĺa-s…ô.ma-tu-r~…ĺuo atu a ¶awa nida ¶i si-r~…ĺi-ja.fuo-r~…ĺuo-r~…ĺ…ôi-s…ô, saan a par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad…ôn kina ¶…ôn- ¶in tu nikakakutaj. ¶i ma-tu an, nika ina ńßitaj ¶aaj pisaajaw a musakamu tu amir~…ĺika. ina wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa majnańß tu mańßiniaj a kawawan " pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku nipid…ôbuŇč nu ńßitaj", mińßantaj tu " r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kuo ńßur~…ĺi ¶an", saan mińßapu tu ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺan tu kabar~…ĺińß…ônawan nu wajwajan, ńßu- ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i d…ô-…ô-si. r~…ĺuo-d…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s…ô saan tu nikudan mar~…ĺa wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa pir~…ĺinzian nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč. mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ kina kawaw itini i kanatar~…ĺ katuud ku miadińßaj atu ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu nisimsiman. saan ku amir~…ĺika nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i ¶un-pu, amir~…ĺawa ku amir~…ĺik tu wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa, katukuńß tu ¶inr~…ĺi a mańß…ôd…ôk, nika saan ¶i r~…ĺuo-d…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s…ô mib…ôr~…ĺińß tina kamuan, nikudan ina amir~…ĺika nu kuo-w Ē~ °-j…ôn ¶i r~…ĺu-pi-o patar~…ĺuma…ôn nida ku nakamuan nida. nikudan saan ¶i r~…ĺuo-d…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s…ô tu wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa u nikasasakamu…ôn sa a ¶a ¶aj ¶aaj kaw nikaŇčar~…ĺaj a mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw sa, miawda tu amir~…ĺika mapur~…ĺuŇč par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakaŇčaaj nu sakar~…ĺańßat tu sakadadiput nu kawawaan sa. . pikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu wajwajan **** t…ôban nu r~…ĺabi tu tusaaj a tuki, kina pitu kija ku nikabakuńßa ¶an nu wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa, idaw ku ¶a-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺa-wi atu ka-m…ôn.d.u-r~…ĺi-ja tu nijanijaduan, ina kitidaan itida namin i wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa tapiiŇčan nu ma ¶i. u bakuńßa ¶…ônanaj u sakajt…ôr~…ĺajan atu kakitidaan nu ńßitaj. ******, . saan ku m…ôi-r~…ĺ…ôn-s…ô, nina nika r~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan matur~…ĺin tu paŇčkiw nu tukian. idaw ku makaadińßaj nu tad…ômaw tina ka-r~…ĺa-ka-s…ô nu ńßitajan idaw ku wa ¶ańß namakar~…ĺabu sa, idaw ku kainai Ē~ °an nu diŇčkian. ina wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa mib…ôr~…ĺińßaj nu sakakaaj ¶i ma-r~…ĺi-ja. k…ô-zuj-na.ma- ¶a-duo nu musakamuaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ta-wi.s…ô-muo-r~…ĺan-s…ô- ¶i musakamu tu k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja pasiŇčbuŇčaj, u ti-u-na-paw atu mi-r~…ĺan-ta kuŇč nu ńßitajan, r~…ĺa-kua-ji-r~…ĺa minatu atu aj-…ô-wuo-kan buju nu diŇčkian katukuńßan tu a mar~…ĺu ¶…ôk a kuwaŇčan. wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa nu ńßitaj a sakakaaj ¶i fuo-r~…ĺa-di-mi-…ô. pa-d…ô-r~…ĺi-nuo. r~…ĺuo-p…ôi- ¶…ô saan, ina amir~…ĺika nu sikur~…ĺupir~…ĺaan a ńßikuki itida i tukaj a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺa ¶uan atu mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺa ¶uan, ajda misam…ôt…ôk ńß…ônaj pina ku mapatajaj a tad…ômaw sa. .
